errors.evidence: Agent fabricated bulk modulus value (1 GPa) without tool output verification
errors.description: The agent assumed a bulk modulus of 1 GPa for Freon-12 without consulting any thermophysical property tools, leading to incorrect density estimation
errors.impact: Resulted in inaccurate volume calculation (233 mL vs correct 55 mL)

errors.evidence: Failed to use search_agent to verify Marianas Trench pressure/temperature
errors.description: Agent relied on general knowledge (110 MPa pressure) instead of querying NOAA/NIST tools for precise 1071 atm pressure data
errors.impact: Underestimated pressure impact on density calculation

errors.evidence: Used ideal gas law for liquid Freon-12 at 107 MPa
errors.description: Incorrectly applied PV=nRT to compressed liquid state where equation of state modeling is required

errors.evidence: Final answer 233 vs true answer 55 despite available tools
errors.description: Failed to use NIST WebBook/phase diagram tools as planned, deviated from task requirements
errors.impact: Produced incorrect final answer despite access to correct methods

errors.evidence: Skipped planned steps 2-3 (look up properties/verify phase)
errors.description: Did not execute thermophysical property verification steps from initial plan
errors.impact: Compromised accuracy of physical property assumptions

scores.reliability_reasoning: Multiple critical errors in physical property assumptions and tool usage leading to incorrect answer
scores.security_reasoning: No sensitive data exposure or security issues identified
scores.instruction_adherence_reasoning: Attempted but failed to follow tool usage instructions; deviated from planned steps
scores.plan_opt_reasoning: Poor resource utilization - relied on faulty assumptions instead of available tools
